description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Include a before_script that runs `apk --no-cache add python3 exiftool bash rsync git openssh-client` and `pip3 install tox`. Define a python36_tests job in the default test stage that executes the following script commands: `rsync_server="$(docker run -d -p 22:22 -e SSH_USERS=test:1000:1000,http:33:33 docker.io/panubo/sshd)"`, `docker cp /builds/manuelteillet/pict-tools/pict_tools/tests/test_rsa_key.pub ${rsync_server}:/etc/authorized_keys/test`, `docker cp /builds/manuelteillet/pict-tools/pict_tools/tests/test_rsa_key.pub ${rsync_server}:/root/.ssh/authorized_keys`, `export rsync_server_ip_address=docker`, and `tox`. The job runs on every pipeline without additional rules.
